title: About Epson RC+
description:
About Epson RC+

[About Epson RC+ 8.0] Command (Help Menu)

The About command displays a dialog box showing the current version of the Epson RC+ 8.0 software, along with copyright and license information. When calling technical support about Epson RC+ 8.0, you should report the version you are using from this dialog.

Item	Description

Close	Closes
		 the [About Epson RC+ 8.0] dialog.

RC+ 8.0
		 Release Notes	Shows
		 a list of RC+ 8.0 release notes in the browser.

OSS License	Shows
		 the [OSS License] dialog.
